Australian Telecommunications Vendors

Below is an index of Australian telecommunications vendors and global providers with an Australian presence. We provide positive, factual summaries of their typical capabilities. If you are reviewing your current provider or exploring alternatives, we can help you compare options—without negative commentary about any vendor.

Vendors (A–Z)

8x8 AAPT Activ8me Adam Internet AGL Telecommunications AirTrunk ALDI Mobile Amaysim Ant Communications AT&T Australia Aussie Broadband Avaya Beam Internet Belong Bendigo Telco BlueFace Boost Mobile Borderway Brennan IT Broadsoft Broadvoice BT Global Services Australia Buddy Telco Burst SMS Catch Connect Cisco Webex Clear Networks ClickSend Cloudli Cogent Communications Coles Mobile Commander Comms Group Console Connect Crazytel DGTek Dialpad Dodo Enablis Equinix Escapenet Exetel Faktortel Felix Mobile Field Solutions Group Flip Connect Frontier Networks Fujitsu Australia Gamma Solutions Global Switch Gomo GoTo Harbour ISP Harbour IT Heroalk iiNet Infosys Australia Inmarsat Interactive Internode IP Systems iPrimus IPStar Iridium KDDI Australia Kogan Mobile Launtel LBNCo Leaptel Lebara Mobile Lightning Broadband Lyca Mobile Mate Broadband MaxoTel Megaport MessageMedia Metaswitch Microsoft Teams Calling Mint Telecom Mitel Moose Mobile More Telecom MyNetFone MyOwnTel NBN Co NEC Australia Net SIP Nexon Asia Pacific Next Telecom NEXTDC Node1 NTT Communications NuMobile OPENetworks Opticomm Optus Orange Business Services Origin Broadband Orion Satellite Systems PCCW Global Pennytel Pentanet Pivotel ReachNet Redtrain RingCentral SatPhonics Sinch Singtel Optus Sipcity SkyMesh Southern Phone Spark New Zealand Speedcast SpinTel Spirit Technology Solutions Starlink Sumo Superloop Swoop Tangerine Telecom Tata Communications TeleChoice Telnyx Telstra Tenet Think Mobile Thuraya TPG Telecom Tuas Limited Twilio Uniti Group Verizon Australia Vertel Vocus (Vocus Group) Vodafone Australia VoipLine Telecom Vonex VostroNet Westnet Wi-Sky Wipro Australia Woolworths Mobile YourLink Zayo Group Zoom Phone

More vendor pages can be added over time. Contact us for an independent review of your telecommunications and to compare alternatives.
